result.value: Diabetes mellitus in which there are frequent, clinically significant fluctuations in blood glucose levels both above and below levels expected to be achieved by available therapies.
Frequent, clinically significant fluctuations in blood glucose levels both above and below levels expected to be achieved by available therapies.
